scripts.start: concurrently -k -n srv,queue,vite -c blue,green,yellow "php artisan serve --host=127.0.0.1 --port=18080" "php artisan queue:work redis --queue=geoflow,distribution,content-publish,theme-replication,agent_scout,default --sleep=1 --tries=3 --timeout=600" "vite"
scripts.start-server: concurrently -k -n srv,queue -c blue,green "php artisan serve --host=127.0.0.1 --port=18080" "php artisan queue:work redis --queue=geoflow,distribution,content-publish,theme-replication,agent_scout,default --sleep=1 --tries=3 --timeout=600"
